verses.latin_vulgate: In finem. Psalmus David.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַ֭מְנַצֵּחַ לְדָוִ֣ד מִזְמ֑וֹר אֱלֹהֵ֥י תְ֝הִלָּתִ֗י אַֽל־תֶּחֱרַֽשׁ׃
verses.king_james: Hold not thy peace, O God of my praise;

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus, laudem meam ne tacueris,  quia os peccatoris et os dolosi super me apertum est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י פִ֪י רָשָׁ֡ע וּֽפִי־מִ֭רְמָה עָלַ֣י פָּתָ֑חוּ דִּבְּר֥וּ אִ֝תִּ֗י לְשׁ֣וֹן שָֽׁקֶר׃
verses.king_james: For the mouth of the wicked and the mouth of the deceitful are opened against me: they have spoken against me with a lying tongue.

verses.latin_vulgate: Locuti sunt adversum me lingua dolosa,  et sermonibus odii circumdederunt me :  et expugnaverunt me gratis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְדִבְרֵ֣י שִׂנְאָ֣ה סְבָב֑וּנִי וַיִּֽלָּחֲמ֥וּנִי חִנָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: They compassed me about also with words of hatred; and fought against me without a cause.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pro eo ut me diligerent, detrahebant mihi ;  ego autem orabam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תַּֽחַת־אַהֲבָתִ֥י יִשְׂטְנ֗וּנִי וַאֲנִ֥י תְפִלָּֽה׃
verses.king_james: For my love they are my adversaries: but I give myself unto prayer.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et posuerunt adversum me mala pro bonis,  et odium pro dilectione mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֘שִׂ֤ימוּ עָלַ֣י רָ֭עָה תַּ֣חַת טוֹבָ֑ה וְ֝שִׂנְאָ֗ה תַּ֣חַת אַהֲבָתִֽי׃
verses.king_james: And they have rewarded me evil for good, and hatred for my love.

verses.latin_vulgate: Constitue super eum peccatorem,  et diabolus stet a dextris ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַפְקֵ֣ד עָלָ֣יו רָשָׁ֑ע וְ֝שָׂטָ֗ן יַעֲמֹ֥ד עַל־יְמִינֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Set thou a wicked man over him: and let Satan stand at his right hand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cum judicatur, exeat condemnatus ;  et oratio ejus fiat in peccatum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּ֭הִשָּׁ֣פְטוֹ יֵצֵ֣א רָשָׁ֑ע וּ֝תְפִלָּת֗וֹ תִּֽהְיֶ֥ה לַחֲטָאָֽה׃
verses.king_james: When he shall be judged, let him be condemned: and let his prayer become sin.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fiant dies ejus pauci,  et episcopatum ejus accipiat alter.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִֽהְיוּ־יָמָ֥יו מְעַטִּ֑ים פְּ֝קֻדָּת֗וֹ יִקַּ֥ח אַחֵֽר׃
verses.king_james: Let his days be few; and let another take his office.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fiant filii ejus orphani,  et uxor ejus vidua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִֽהְיוּ־בָנָ֥יו יְתוֹמִ֑ים וְ֝אִשְׁתּ֗וֹ אַלְמָנָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Let his children be fatherless, and his wife a widow.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nutantes transferantur filii ejus et mendicent,  et ejiciantur de habitationibus suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנ֤וֹעַ יָנ֣וּעוּ בָנָ֣יו וְשִׁאֵ֑לוּ וְ֝דָרְשׁ֗וּ מֵחׇרְבֽוֹתֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: Let his children be continually vagabonds, and beg: let them seek their bread also out of their desolate places.

verses.latin_vulgate: Scrutetur fœnerator omnem substantiam ejus,  et diripiant alieni labores ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְנַקֵּ֣שׁ נ֭וֹשֶׁה לְכׇל־אֲשֶׁר־ל֑וֹ וְיָבֹ֖זּוּ זָרִ֣ים יְגִיעֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Let the extortioner catch all that he hath; and let the strangers spoil his labour.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non sit illi adjutor,  nec sit qui misereatur pupillis ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַל־יְהִי־ל֭וֹ מֹשֵׁ֣ךְ חָ֑סֶד וְֽאַל־יְהִ֥י ח֝וֹנֵ֗ן לִֽיתוֹמָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: Let there be none to extend mercy unto him: neither let there be any to favour his fatherless children.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fiant nati ejus in interitum ;  in generatione una deleatur nomen ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהִי־אַחֲרִית֥וֹ לְהַכְרִ֑ית בְּד֥וֹר אַ֝חֵ֗ר יִמַּ֥ח שְׁמָֽם׃
verses.king_james: Let his posterity be cut off; and in the generation following let their name be blotted out.

verses.latin_vulgate: In memoriam redeat iniquitas patrum ejus in conspectu Domini,  et peccatum matris ejus non deleatur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִזָּכֵ֤ר ׀ עֲוֺ֣ן אֲ֭בֹתָיו אֶל־יְהֹוָ֑ה וְחַטַּ֥את אִ֝מּ֗וֹ אַל־תִּמָּֽח׃
verses.king_james: Let the iniquity of his fathers be remembered with the Lord; and let not the sin of his mother be blotted out.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fiant contra Dominum semper,  et dispereat de terra memoria eorum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִהְי֣וּ נֶגֶד־יְהֹוָ֣ה תָּמִ֑יד וְיַכְרֵ֖ת מֵאֶ֣רֶץ זִכְרָֽם׃
verses.king_james: Let them be before the Lord continually, that he may cut off the memory of them from the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: pro eo quod non est recordatus facere misericordiam,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַ֗עַן אֲשֶׁ֤ר ׀ לֹ֥א זָכַר֮ עֲשׂ֢וֹת חָ֥֫סֶד וַיִּרְדֹּ֡ף אִישׁ־עָנִ֣י וְ֭אֶבְיוֹן וְנִכְאֵ֨ה לֵבָ֬ב לְמוֹתֵֽת׃
verses.king_james: Because that he remembered not to shew mercy, but persecuted the poor and needy man, that he might even slay the broken in heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: et persecutus est hominem inopem et mendicum,  et compunctum corde, mortificare.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֶּאֱהַ֣ב קְ֭לָלָה וַתְּבוֹאֵ֑הוּ וְֽלֹא־חָפֵ֥ץ בִּ֝בְרָכָ֗ה וַתִּרְחַ֥ק מִמֶּֽנּוּ׃
verses.king_james: As he loved cursing, so let it come unto him: as he delighted not in blessing, so let it be far from him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dilexit maledictionem, et veniet ei ;  et noluit benedictionem, et elongabitur ab eo.  Et induit maledictionem sicut vestimentum ;  et intravit sicut aqua in interiora ejus,  et sicut oleum in ossibus ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּלְבַּ֥שׁ קְלָלָ֗ה כְּמַ֫דּ֥וֹ וַתָּבֹ֣א כַמַּ֣יִם בְּקִרְבּ֑וֹ וְ֝כַשֶּׁ֗מֶן בְּעַצְמוֹתָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: As he clothed himself with cursing like as with his garment, so let it come into his bowels like water, and like oil into his bones.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fiat ei sicut vestimentum quo operitur,  et sicut zona qua semper præcingitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תְּהִי־ל֭וֹ כְּבֶ֣גֶד יַעְטֶ֑ה וּ֝לְמֵ֗זַח תָּמִ֥יד יַחְגְּרֶֽהָ׃
verses.king_james: Let it be unto him as the garment which covereth him, and for a girdle wherewith he is girded continually.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hoc opus eorum qui detrahunt mihi apud Dominum,  et qui loquuntur mala adversus animam meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֹ֤את פְּעֻלַּ֣ת שֹׂ֭טְנַי מֵאֵ֣ת יְהֹוָ֑ה וְהַדֹּבְרִ֥ים רָ֝֗ע עַל־נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.king_james: Let this be the reward of mine adversaries from the Lord, and of them that speak evil against my soul.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et tu, Domine, Domine, fac mecum propter nomen tuum,  quia suavis est misericordia tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֤ה ׀ יֱ֘הֹוִ֤ה אֲדֹנָ֗י עֲֽשֵׂה־אִ֭תִּי לְמַ֣עַן שְׁמֶ֑ךָ כִּי־ט֥וֹב חַ֝סְדְּךָ֗ הַצִּילֵֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: But do thou for me, O God the Lord, for thy name’s sake: because thy mercy is good, deliver thou me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Libera me, quia egenus et pauper ego sum,  et cor meum conturbatum est intra me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־עָנִ֣י וְאֶבְי֣וֹן אָנֹ֑כִי וְ֝לִבִּ֗י חָלַ֥ל בְּקִרְבִּֽי׃
verses.king_james: For I am poor and needy, and my heart is wounded within me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sicut umbra cum declinat ablatus sum,  et excussus sum sicut locustæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּצֵל־כִּנְטוֹת֥וֹ נֶהֱלָ֑כְתִּי נִ֝נְעַ֗רְתִּי כָּאַרְבֶּֽה׃
verses.king_james: I am gone like the shadow when it declineth: I am tossed up and down as the locust.

verses.latin_vulgate: Genua mea infirmata sunt a jejunio,  et caro mea immutata est propter oleum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּ֭רְכַּי כָּשְׁל֣וּ מִצּ֑וֹם וּ֝בְשָׂרִ֗י כָּחַ֥שׁ מִשָּֽׁמֶן׃
verses.king_james: My knees are weak through fasting; and my flesh faileth of fatness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ego factus sum opprobrium illis ;  viderunt me, et moverunt capita sua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנִ֤י ׀ הָיִ֣יתִי חֶרְפָּ֣ה לָהֶ֑ם יִ֝רְא֗וּנִי יְנִיע֥וּן רֹאשָֽׁם׃
verses.king_james: I became also a reproach unto them: when they looked upon me they shaked their heads.

verses.latin_vulgate: Adjuva me, Domine Deus meus ;  salvum me fac secundum misericordiam tuam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עׇ֭זְרֵנִי יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהָ֑י ה֖וֹשִׁיעֵ֣נִי כְחַסְדֶּֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: Help me, O Lord my God: O save me according to thy mercy:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et sciant quia manus tua hæc,  et tu, Domine, fecisti eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽ֭יֵדְעוּ כִּי־יָ֣דְךָ זֹּ֑את אַתָּ֖ה יְהֹוָ֣ה עֲשִׂיתָֽהּ׃
verses.king_james: That they may know that this is thy hand; that thou, Lord, hast done it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Maledicent illi, et tu benedices :  qui insurgunt in me confundantur ;  servus autem tuus lætabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְקַֽלְלוּ־הֵמָּה֮ וְאַתָּ֢ה תְבָ֫רֵ֥ךְ קָ֤מוּ ׀ וַיֵּבֹ֗שׁוּ וְֽעַבְדְּךָ֥ יִשְׂמָֽח׃
verses.king_james: Let them curse, but bless thou: when they arise, let them be ashamed; but let thy servant rejoice.

verses.latin_vulgate: Induantur qui detrahunt mihi pudore,  et operiantur sicut diploide confusione sua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִלְבְּשׁ֣וּ שׂוֹטְנַ֣י כְּלִמָּ֑ה וְיַעֲט֖וּ כַמְעִ֣יל בׇּשְׁתָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: Let mine adversaries be clothed with shame, and let them cover themselves with their own confusion, as with a mantle.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confitebor Domino nimis in ore meo,  et in medio multorum laudabo eum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: א֘וֹדֶ֤ה יְהֹוָ֣ה מְאֹ֣ד בְּפִ֑י וּבְת֖וֹךְ רַבִּ֣ים אֲהַלְלֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.king_james: I will greatly praise the Lord with my mouth; yea, I will praise him among the multitude.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia astitit a dextris pauperis,  ut salvam faceret a persequentibus animam meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־יַ֭עֲמֹד לִימִ֣ין אֶבְי֑וֹן לְ֝הוֹשִׁ֗יעַ מִשֹּׁפְטֵ֥י נַפְשֽׁוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: For he shall stand at the right hand of the poor, to save him from those that condemn his soul.
